feature.name: JSON Schema $ref resolution
feature.description: Extract referencing Registry/Resolver $ref, anchor, and fragment resolution for JSON Schema dialects without jsonschema validator implementations.
included_behaviors: Registry resource registration and base URI resolution
typed unresolvable and unknown dialect errors
excluded_behaviors: referencing test suite and original package import

entanglement.description: Ref resolution couples immutable Registry graphs, Specification dialect hooks, fragment pointer walks, and rpds-backed resolver stacks.
signals: Specification objects vary anchor and id extraction across draft versions
Resolver maintains dynamic scope for recursive refs
Registry merges resources with URI normalization
repo includes upstream tests for copy-all penalty

output.import: from featurelifted import Registry, Resource; from featurelifted.jsonschema import DRAFT202012, DRAFT7, UnknownDialect; from featurelifted.exceptions import Unresolvable, NoSuchAnchor
